subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-01 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Thy present condition is transitory... Dissatisfaction with one's self is a sign of progress. The soul who is satisfied with himself is the manifestation of Satan
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation
